prompt.content:
Make the following changes to the DCF model
- Assume that the SPGI share price is instead the closing share price as of 1/6/2026
- Subscription revenue in 2026 is the average of the three preceding years. Subsequent years in the projection period add 100 incremental basis points to the growth rate per year
- Non-subscription / transaction revenue grows at 80% of the subscription revenue growth rate every year
- Non-transaction and other revenue streams grow at 50% of the subscription revenue growth rate every year
- beta is 1.25

Output the following:
- total revenue in 2030 rounded to the nearest whole number in million
- equity value per share, rounded to two decimal places, via the perpetuity method

rubrics.name: States 2030 revenue is $22,569 million (acceptable range $22,343 to $22,795) (ver_f29752f9c1e746f599565427a2cd6afc)

rubrics.name: States equity value per share via perpetuity method is $356.90 (acceptable... (ver_845556fbab8d41a38f6b2057e1fe3ec0)

messages.content: States equity value per share via perpetuity method is $356.90 (acceptable range $353.33 to $360.47).
